title: Data Engineering Fundamentals for Analysts
transcript: Due to AI, the role of data analyst and data engineer are merging gradually. Talking specifically about data analyst role, some of the low-level technical work that you used to do previously is being automated by AI and now companies expect you to contribute in the other areas of data life cycle such as data engineering.
